name: hexsleeves-tailscale-mcp
title: Tailscale (Full Management)
description: Comprehensive Tailscale management — ~15 tools covering devices, ACLs, DNS, keys, and network configuration
author: HexSleeves

highlights.text: ~15 tools — device management, ACL editing, DNS config
CLI + API hybrid — some tools use the Tailscale binary
OAuth + API key — both auth methods supported

setup.blurb: Full Tailscale management with ~15 tools — devices, ACLs, DNS, keys, and network config. For comprehensive configuration management.
setup.help_text: Enter your Tailscale API key and tailnet name. This MCP provides full management capability including ACL editing and DNS configuration changes.

notes: Community listing for HexSleeves/tailscale-mcp (80+ stars). Full management MCP with ~15 tools including ACL editing. For monitoring and security visibility with token-efficient output, use the certified tailscale-blade-mcp instead.
